symptoms_user_input:
Device came in the shop and would not power on and would not charge (pulled zero amps from the charger)
After disassembling the device I installed a temporary battery. The device powers on with a charged battery but still does not charge. The device passes a Tristar Tester, but I still recommend replacing the Tristar Charging IC.

outcome.fix: Replaced Tristar Charging IC, Replaced Charge Port
